text: 1065 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ مَنْصُورُ بْنُ حَازِمٍ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «إِذَا سُلِّمَ عَلَى اَلرَّجُلِ وَ هُوَ يُصَلِّي يَرُدُّ عَلَيْهِ خَفِيّاً كَمَا قَالَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1065 - Mansur ibn Hazim narrated from Imam (as) that He said:
"If someone greets a man while he is praying, he should respond to him quietly, as He (the greeter) said."
